title: Nest (command center)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''The Nest''' was the command center of [[the Rig]] and the headquarters of the [[Crimson Nova]] Chapter of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]].

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 66|''Republic'' 66]]

==Sources==
